backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that composes blob storage functionality via the MixinStorage mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report describing two tasks: replacing the FootballBrosGame page with an iframe embedding footballbros.io, and removing the now-unused useFootballBrosGame hook file.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source files to short descriptions summarizing each page, component, and hook in the arcade hub project.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom property tokens for light and dark arcade themes including colors, borders, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell with the page title 'Arcade Hub — Play Classic Games', Google Fonts preconnect hints, and a root div for the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the TanStack Router tree with 16 game routes (including /football-bros) wrapped in the shared Layout component.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Site-wide layout with a sticky retro arcade header containing nav links for all 16 games, a responsive mobile hamburger menu, main content slot, and a footer.
frontend/src/components/Leaderboard.tsx: Reusable leaderboard component that reads top scores from localStorage, displays up to 5 ranked entries with neon accent styling, and supports both higher-is-better and lower-is-better modes.
Score submission form that accepts a nickname (up to 10 characters), saves the entry to localStorage via useLocalLeaderboard, and shows a confirmation state after saving.
frontend/src/hooks/use1v1LolGame.ts: Implements a 1v1 platformer shooting game hook with player/AI characters, projectiles, wall placement, collision resolution, and game state management using refs for performance.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Provides a React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAmongUsGame.ts: Implements an Among Us-inspired mini-game hook where the player completes tasks while avoiding an impostor, managing movement, task interaction, and win/lose conditions via refs.
frontend/src/hooks/useFnafGame.ts: Implements a Five Nights at Freddy's-style survival game hook with animatronic movement along camera paths, door/power management, night timer, and jumpscare logic.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to React components.
frontend/src/hooks/useLeaderboard.ts: Provides a local leaderboard hook that persists and retrieves top-10 scores per game in localStorage, supporting both ascending and descending sort orders.
frontend/src/hooks/useMinecraftClassicGa: Implements a 2D Minecraft-style game hook with procedurally generated terrain, block mining/placement, player physics with gravity and jumping, and camera tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useOvoGame.ts: Defines types, level data, and game state for a multi-level 2D platformer (OVO-style) with player physics including jumping, sliding, wall-jumping, and hazard detection. Contains three level definitions with platforms, gaps, hazards, and exits.
frontend/src/hooks/usePokemonGame.ts: Implements a turn-based Pokémon-style battle game hook with a roster of six typed Pokémon, move/damage calculations, and battle phase management. Provides state and callbacks for selecting Pokémon, executing moves, and tracking battle logs.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty placeholder module reserved for future backend query hooks, noting that leaderboard data currently uses localStorage instead.
frontend/src/hooks/useRetroBowlGame.ts: Implements a retro American football game hook with play selection (run/short-pass/long-pass), aiming, ball physics, and defender AI across a drive-based scoring system. Manages game state via a ref for frame-level updates and exposes controls for play selection, aiming, and throwing.
frontend/src/hooks/useRocketSoccerLeague: Implements a 3D Rocket League-style soccer game hook with physics for a player car, AI car, and ball on a bounded field, including boost mechanics, goal detection, and a match timer. Separates physics state in a ref from UI state updated via React useState.
frontend/src/hooks/useSlopeGame.ts: Implements a Slope-style endless runner game hook where a ball rolls down a lane, avoiding procedurally generated box and gap obstacles while accelerating over time. Handles steering input, collision detection, lane boundary checks, and obstacle lifecycle management.
frontend/src/hooks/useStickmanArchersGam: React hook managing a two-archer turn-based game with physics-based arrow projectiles, AI opponent logic, health tracking, and aim/shoot controls for single or two-player modes.
frontend/src/hooks/useSuperMarioGame.ts: React hook providing Super Mario-style platformer game state including level layout (platforms, enemies, coins), physics constants, and player input handling via a ref-based state approach.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and Tailwind, defining a retro arcade dark theme with OKLCH CSS variables and neon-colored button/utility component classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AmongUsGame.tsx: Among Us-inspired canvas game page that renders rooms, task stations, an impostor, and the player character, with game-over/win overlays and score submission/leaderboard components.
frontend/src/pages/FnafGame.tsx: Five Nights at Freddy's-style canvas game page rendering an office/camera surveillance view with door controls, animatronic tracking, power management, and score submission/leaderboard components.
frontend/src/pages/FootballBrosGame.tsx: Simple page that embeds the external Football Bros game via an iframe alongside a leaderboard sidebar component.
frontend/src/pages/GameLobby.tsx: Renders the main game lobby page displaying a grid of available games (Snake, Tic-Tac-Toe, Memory Match, etc.) with styled cards and navigation links, alongside a Leaderboard component.
frontend/src/pages/MemoryMatchGame.tsx: Implements the Memory Match card-flipping game with shuffle logic, move tracking, match detection, and a completion screen that integrates score submission and a leaderboard.
Renders a 2D Minecraft-style block-building game on an HTML canvas, handling tile-based world drawing, player rendering, hotbar UI, and delegating game logic to the useMinecraftClassicGame hook.
frontend/src/pages/OneLolGame.tsx: Implements a 1v1 shooter game page using a canvas renderer that draws characters, projectiles, walls, and HP bars, with game loop management and score submission on game over.
frontend/src/pages/OvoGame.tsx: Renders the OvO speed-run platformer game with a canvas element driven by the useOvoGame hook, polling game state for HUD updates (timer, level) and supporting score submission on completion.
frontend/src/pages/PokemonGame.tsx: Renders a turn-based Pokémon battle game page with roster selection, battle arena with HP bars, battle log, and post-game score submission and leaderboard display, powered by the usePokemonGame hook.
frontend/src/pages/RetroBowlGame.tsx: Implements a canvas-based retro American football game page where players select plays, aim, and throw passes, with a drawn field, players, and defenders, plus score submission and leaderboard on game over.
frontend/src/pages/RocketSoccerLeagueGam: Renders a 3D Rocket League-style soccer game using React Three Fiber, with a neon-lit arena, player/AI cars, a glowing ball, and a camera that follows the player, plus HUD, score submission, and leaderboard.
frontend/src/pages/SlopeGame.tsx: Implements a 3D endless runner slope game using React Three Fiber where a ball rolls down a lane avoiding obstacles, with keyboard controls, score tracking, and post-game score submission and leaderboard.
frontend/src/pages/SnakeGame.tsx: Classic Snake game rendered on an HTML canvas with neon visuals, keyboard controls, collision detection, and score submission with leaderboard shown on game over.
frontend/src/pages/StickmanArchersGame.t: React page component for the Stickman Archers game that renders a canvas-based two-player archery game with stickman characters, arrows, and a neon night-sky background using drawing helpers and the useStickmanArchersGame hook.
frontend/src/pages/SuperMarioGame.tsx: React page component for a Super Mario-style platformer game that renders platforms, coins, enemies, and a Mario character on a canvas using the useSuperMarioGame hook, with score display and leaderboard integration.
frontend/src/pages/TicTacToeGame.tsx: React page component for a two-player Tic-Tac-Toe game with win/draw detection, winning line highlighting, and a retro arcade neon visual theme using Tailwind CSS.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining the arcade-themed design system including neon accent colors, pixel fonts, custom box shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes using oklch color values.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking version, architectural notes, known issues, and a list of implemented features for a multi-game browser platform built with React and Tailwind CSS.
